title: The Merry Month of May
excerpt: Despite being sick for a number of days, May was overall a very good month. And like all the others, it seemed to zip on by. Life was more of the same this month - paper, work, events, babies, doggies,…
body:
Despite being sick for a number of days, May was overall a very good month. And like all the others, it seemed to zip on by.

Life was more of the same this month -  paper, work, events, babies, doggies, being outside, food, with some travels (and 2 vacations!) thrown in. Life is full. And boy does it move fast. Still grateful (and a bit surprised) to be keeping up with this daily documentation. Here is the tutorial on how I made the collage.  Digi washi tape by Rhonna Designs. Hello there, June.
